APPROVE
Clean, targeted implementation. The Disrupted classification is added at the right two seams (preflight rejection inline; post-executor via `classifyDisruption(ctx, err)`), the cooldown branch short-circuits on Disrupted without touching genuine no-progress semantics, and the `disruption_detected` event lands on both the bead and the loop sink. artifact: .ddx/executions/20260503T021724-8a33226e/reviewer-stream.log

merged onto current tip
Clean, targeted implementation. The Disrupted classification is added at the right two seams (preflight rejection inline; post-executor via `classifyDisruption(ctx, err)`), the cooldown branch short-circuits on Disrupted without touching genuine no-progress semantics, and the `disruption_detected` event lands on both the bead and the loop sink. Test coverage matches the AC bullet-for-bullet, the transport-marker fuzziness is acknowledged in code comments, and FEAT-006 documents the policy with a kind-table operators can read. Optional exponential backoff was correctly skipped per AC.
